notes.note: The SP has requested to pause the services as she is having shortage of staff and financial issues. We already downgraded her previously. The SP has been getting leads consistently and also booking the leads. So the product is clearly working here. Spoke to Rinitha about this specific account, she has given me the approval to off board the account.
